offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient manual auditing causes late reimbursements. We automate expense report auditing instead of manual auditing processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient manual auditing of expense reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accountants
try_it: Let users try receipt scanning and anomaly flagging on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
